appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/clock-skew-constraints.md documenting bifrost-signer max_future_skew_secs=30 and why asymmetric ±120s validation is treated as deviation coverage.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve agent-browser requirement conflicts and followedProcedure semantics across ui-screen-worker/runtime-worker/protocol-flow-worker so workers can report deviations consistently.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple m7 round-2 reviews observed contradictory rules between AGENTS.md and skill files, plus handoffs marked followedProcedure=true despite skipping required agent-browser/Playwright steps.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit procedure carve-outs for docs-only and test-infrastructure micro-fixes, and require explicit deviation logging when RED-first, demo-gallery Playwright, or agent-browser steps are skipped.
Reconcile stale onboarding residual text that still describes awaiting_adoption-only behavior now superseded by full sponsor-requester handshake validation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for fix-m7-scrutiny-r1-onboard-distinct-share-full-handshake found lines describing pre-fix residual behavior inconsistent with current multi-device spec assertions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat missing tsconfig.node/demo-gallery runs in runtime-worker handoffs as immediate blocking failures for this round.
Record each repeated skill-procedure mismatch as separate guidance updates.
